title: EFL Cutscene Definition
description: Schema for EFL cutscene eligibility and side-effect declarations. Cutscene content (dialogue, scene steps) lives in MOMI's __mist__.json. EFL owns the eligibility gate (trigger evaluation) and the side effects that fire when FoM confirms the cutscene played.

id.description: Unique cutscene identifier. Must match the key used in FoM's cutscene registry (loaded by gml_Script_load_cutscenes).

trigger.description: EFL trigger ID that must evaluate true for this cutscene to be eligible. Empty string or omitted = unconditional (always eligible unless blocked by 'once').

once.description: If true, EFL blocks re-evaluation after the cutscene is first marked eligible. Mirrors FoM's own once semantics.

onFire.description: Side effects applied by EFL when the cutscene fires (either via check_cutscene_eligible interception or via an area entry/exit trigger path).

setFlags.description: EFL flag names to set to true when this cutscene fires.

clearFlags.description: EFL flag names to clear (set false) when this cutscene fires.

startQuest.description: EFL quest ID to start when this cutscene fires. The quest must be registered in the same pack.

advanceQuest.description: EFL quest ID to advance by one stage when this cutscene fires.

grantItemId.description: Numeric item ID to grant the player when this cutscene fires. ID is the index into t2_input.json's items array (e.g. look up your item name in that list to find its index).
